abilities.name: Chatty
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must each discard a card to declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

abilities.name: Warning Growl
abilities.text: Attacks targeting friendly models within 2" do not deal additional damage due to raises.

actions.name: Exaggerated Claim
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is within 1" of a Tide marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Gremlin Manners
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare the "Get!" action, drawing range and LoS from the target.

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.

triggers.name: Tall Tale
triggers.text: Discard a card. Target gains a Staggered token and must discard a card.

actions.name: "Get!"
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4". Increase the distance moved by +2" if the target has a Drift token. Then, enemy models in base contact with the target must discard a card or be dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Sinkhole
triggers.text: Make a Tide marker into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: "He Came Outta Nowhere!"
triggers.text: Immediately, place the target in base contact with a Tide Marker within 6" of itself.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.
